title: Revoke or Negative List
description:
Revocation List. This schema is used to represent anything which is revoked/blacklisted aka, negative list. Examples are blacklisted entities in a country, no-fly list, list of credentials revoked from the issuance in an university

Provenance: vendored snapshot from LF-Decentralized-Trust-labs/decentralized-directory-protocol (non-normative copy) as of 2026-03-03.

revoked_id.description: Unique ID which is getting revoked
